# remscontent_catalogue_item (Data Source)

CatalogueItem data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remscontent_catalogue_item" "example_1" {
  title = "Title 1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `title` (String) The catalogue_item title

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The catalogue_item ID
